prompt: Transform the uploaded photo into a highly detailed 3D layered papercut artwork. Create multiple stacked paper layers with visible cut edges, soft shadows between layers, and handcrafted paper textures. Convert all elements into smooth rounded paper shapes with depth and dimension. Use pastel and warm earthy colors, delicate paper-cut foliage, stylized buildings, and a dreamy romantic atmosphere. Make the characters look like cute storybook figures with simple facial features, rosy cheeks, soft expressions, and layered paper hair. Add intricate paper-cut scenery in the background with trees, flowers, pathways, and soft sunset lighting. Ultra-clean composition, premium handcrafted paper art, depth of field, shadow-box effect, whimsical, charming, highly detailed, professional papercraft illustration, 8k quality.
